Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate [Probate Code 11700]
Off Calendar Jun-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court noted that there is no declaration from Kenneth and questions whether he was adopted twice. Ms. Boessenecker stated that no one has checked for an adoption in New York, that she is satisfied because of the birth certificate that was issued in Pennsylvania on April of 2018, that if he had been re-adopted, it would list the new Father's name, that there are multiple relatives that would take if he did not take, and that all of them were contacted and they have not come in. The Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate is taken under submission pending submission of the declaration from Kenneth.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1470 Golden Gate Ave., #2a, San Francisco, Ca 94115)
Off Calendar Jun-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Boessenecker for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $1,025,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 8, 2018. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
